/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/DeviceAgent.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/DeviceAgent.dir/DeviceAgent_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DeviceAgent.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DeviceAgent.dir/agent.cpp.o -o DeviceAgent  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.15 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Multimedia.so.5.15.15 -lmosquitto /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.15.15 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.15 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.15
